scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@sase/shared && npm run build --workspace=@sase/web && npm run build --workspace=@sase/api
scripts.build:pages: npm run build --workspace=@sase/shared && npm run build --workspace=@sase/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@sase/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
